requirement_topic.en: EMC — RED Art. 3.1(b) / EN 301 489 Series (Hungary / EU)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容 — RED第3.1(b)条 / EN 301 489系列（匈牙利 / 欧盟）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容 — RED第3.1(b)條 / EN 301 489系列（匈牙利 / 歐盟）

summary.en: Under RED 2014/53/EU Art. 3.1(b), radio equipment placed on the Hungarian market must be constructed so that it does not generate electromagnetic disturbances that prevent radio and telecommunications equipment from operating as intended, and is constructed so as to have a level of immunity from electromagnetic disturbance that allows it to operate as intended. The applicable harmonised EMC standards for wireless devices are the EN 301 489 series published by ETSI. EN 301 489-1 v2.2.3 provides the common technical requirements for EMC applicable to all radio equipment. Device-specific parts include EN 301 489-3 (short-range devices including Bluetooth), EN 301 489-17 v3.2.4 (broadband data transmission systems including Wi-Fi), EN 301 489-19 (satellite Earth stations), and EN 301 489-52 (cellular IoT including LTE-M and NB-IoT). Compliance with these harmonised standards grants presumption of conformity with RED Art. 3.1(b). NMHH coordinates with the Hungarian Institute for Quality and Organisational Development (KÜSZ) and MSZT on EMC standards. Radiated emissions tests must be conducted to ETSI methodology; Chinese GB standards use different test methods and limits under CISPR derivations that may not be directly comparable. Hungary's active manufacturing sector (Bosch, Samsung, Continental, etc.) means EMC enforcement through supply chain audits is robust.
summary.zh: 依据RED 2014/53/EU第3.1(b)条，投放匈牙利市场的无线电设备须保证不产生妨碍无线电和电信设备按预期运行的电磁干扰，同时须具备足够的电磁抗扰度，确保其能按预期运行。无线设备适用的协调EMC标准为ETSI发布的EN 301 489系列。EN 301 489-1 v2.2.3提供适用于所有无线电设备的通用EMC技术要求。设备专用部分包括：EN 301 489-3（短距离设备含蓝牙）、EN 301 489-17 v3.2.4（宽带数据传输系统含Wi-Fi）、EN 301 489-19（卫星地球站）及EN 301 489-52（蜂窝物联网含LTE-M和NB-IoT）。符合上述协调标准即可推定符合RED第3.1(b)条。NMHH在EMC标准方面与匈牙利质量和组织发展研究所（KÜSZ）及MSZT协调配合。辐射发射测试须按ETSI方法进行；中国GB标准采用不同的测试方法，其CISPR衍生限值可能不能直接比较。匈牙利活跃的制造业（博世、三星、大陆等）使得供应链审计中的EMC执法更为严格。
summary.zht: 依據RED 2014/53/EU第3.1(b)條，投放匈牙利市場的無線電設備須保證不產生妨礙無線電和電信設備按預期運行的電磁干擾，同時須具備足夠的電磁抗擾度，確保其能按預期運行。無線設備適用的協調EMC標準為ETSI發布的EN 301 489系列。EN 301 489-1 v2.2.3提供適用於所有無線電設備的通用EMC技術要求。設備專用部分包括：EN 301 489-3（短距離設備含藍牙）、EN 301 489-17 v3.2.4（寬頻資料傳輸系統含Wi-Fi）、EN 301 489-19（衛星地球站）及EN 301 489-52（蜂窩物聯網含LTE-M和NB-IoT）。符合上述協調標準即可推定符合RED第3.1(b)條。NMHH在EMC標準方面與匈牙利品質和組織發展研究所（KÜSZ）及MSZT協調配合。輻射發射測試須按ETSI方法進行；中國GB標準採用不同的測試方法，其CISPR衍生限值可能不能直接比較。匈牙利活躍的製造業（博世、三星、大陸等）使得供應鏈審計中的EMC執法更為嚴格。

standards_or_laws: Directive 2014/53/EU (RED), Art. 3.1(b) — electromagnetic compatibility and immunity
EN 301 489-1 v2.2.3 — Electromagnetic compatibility and radio spectrum matters (ERM); EMC standard for radio equipment; Part 1: Common technical requirements
EN 301 489-3 v2.3.2 — Specific conditions for Short Range Devices (SRD) operating on frequencies between 9 kHz and 246 GHz (covers Bluetooth)
EN 301 489-17 v3.2.4 — Specific conditions for Broadband Data Transmission Systems (covers Wi-Fi 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz)
EN 301 489-52 v1.2.1 — Specific conditions for Cellular Communication Mobile and Portable (UE) radio and ancillary equipment (covers LTE-M, NB-IoT)

summary.en: In China, EMC compliance for wireless devices is governed by the GB/T 9254 series (information technology equipment EMC emissions, derived from CISPR 22/32) and GB/T 17626 series (immunity, derived from IEC 61000-4 series), enforced as part of CCC (CNCA-C17-01) and also via SRRC type approval test requirements. MIIT-designated test laboratories conduct EMC measurements under YD/T standards for telecom equipment. The Chinese EMC framework shares the CISPR lineage with ETSI EN 301 489 but applies different frequency-specific limits, measurement distances, and test configurations. CCC EMC certificates do not provide presumption of conformity with RED Art. 3.1(b) in Hungary.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线设备的电磁兼容合规由GB/T 9254系列（信息技术设备EMC发射，源自CISPR 22/32）和GB/T 17626系列（抗扰度，源自IEC 61000-4系列）管辖，作为CCC（CNCA-C17-01）的一部分执行，同时也通过SRRC型号核准检测要求执行。工信部指定检测实验室按YD/T标准对电信设备进行EMC检测。中国EMC框架与ETSI EN 301 489同出CISPR体系，但采用不同的频率专项限值、测量距离和测试配置。CCC EMC证书不提供对匈牙利RED第3.1(b)条的推定符合性。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線設備的電磁相容合規由GB/T 9254系列（信息技術設備EMC發射，源自CISPR 22/32）和GB/T 17626系列（抗擾度，源自IEC 61000-4系列）管轄，作為CCC（CNCA-C17-01）的一部分執行，同時也通過SRRC型號核准檢測要求執行。工信部指定檢測實驗室按YD/T標準對電信設備進行EMC檢測。中國EMC框架與ETSI EN 301 489同出CISPR體系，但採用不同的頻率專項限值、測量距離和測試配置。CCC EMC證書不提供對匈牙利RED第3.1(b)條的推定符合性。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254.1-2021 — Information technology equipment; limits and methods of measurement for radio disturbance characteristics (equivalent to CISPR 32)
GB/T 17626 series — Electromagnetic compatibility testing and measurement techniques (IEC 61000-4 series equivalents)
YD/T 1313 series — Mobile communication equipment electromagnetic compatibility requirements (MIIT)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 9254 and YD/T EMC test reports do not satisfy RED Art. 3.1(b) for the Hungarian market. Key differences: (1) EN 301 489-17 applies frequency-specific conducted and radiated emission limits calibrated to EU spectrum allocation; Chinese GB/T 9254 limits are equipment-category-based rather than radio-technology-specific; (2) ETSI and Chinese measurement distances and antenna configurations differ (e.g. 3m vs 10m chamber measurement default); (3) Immunity tests under EN 301 489-1 reference IEC 61000-4 severity levels that may differ from Chinese YD/T requirements; (4) Hungarian market surveillance by NMHH may audit imported radio equipment supply chains given Hungary's status as a regional manufacturing hub — supply chain EMC documentation must be maintained in accessible form for market surveillance inspection.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 9254和YD/T EMC检测报告不满足匈牙利市场的RED第3.1(b)条要求。主要差异：（1）EN 301 489-17依据欧盟频率分配，对传导和辐射发射限值按频率专项校准；中国GB/T 9254限值基于设备类别而非无线电技术专项；（2）ETSI和中国测量距离及天线配置不同（如3m对比10m暗室测量默认值）；（3）EN 301 489-1下的抗扰度测试引用的IEC 61000-4严酷等级可能与中国YD/T要求不同；（4）考虑到匈牙利作为区域制造中心的地位，NMHH市场监管可能对进口无线电设备供应链进行审计——须以可供市场监管检查的形式保存供应链EMC文件。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 9254和YD/T EMC檢測報告不滿足匈牙利市場的RED第3.1(b)條要求。主要差異：（1）EN 301 489-17依據歐盟頻率分配，對傳導和輻射發射限值按頻率專項校準；中國GB/T 9254限值基於設備類別而非無線電技術專項；（2）ETSI和中國測量距離及天線配置不同（如3m對比10m暗室測量預設值）；（3）EN 301 489-1下的抗擾度測試引用的IEC 61000-4嚴酷等級可能與中國YD/T要求不同；（4）考慮到匈牙利作為區域製造中心的地位，NMHH市場監管可能對進口無線電設備供應鏈進行審計——須以可供市場監管檢查的形式保存供應鏈EMC文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — RED 2014/53/EU Art. 3.1(b); EN 301 489-1 + device-specific parts are harmonised standards; enforced by NMHH in Hungary
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for CCC and SRRC — GB/T 9254 series + YD/T standards; does not satisfy RED Art. 3.1(b)

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] RED Art. 3.1(b) EMC conformity under EN 301 489-1 and device-specific parts (EN 301 489-17 for Wi-Fi, EN 301 489-3 for Bluetooth) is mandatory for wireless devices entering Hungary. Chinese CCC EMC certificates (GB/T 9254 / YD/T) do not satisfy this pathway. Fresh EMC test reports to EN 301 489 from an EU-accredited or ILAC MRA laboratory are required before CE marking and DoC issuance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] EN 301 489-1及设备专用部分（Wi-Fi适用EN 301 489-17，蓝牙适用EN 301 489-3）下的RED第3.1(b)条电磁兼容符合性，是进入匈牙利的无线设备的强制要求。中国CCC EMC证书（GB/T 9254 / YD/T）不满足该路径。须在CE标志和合格声明发布前，提供欧盟认可或ILAC MRA实验室出具的EN 301 489检测报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] EN 301 489-1及設備專用部分（Wi-Fi適用EN 301 489-17，藍牙適用EN 301 489-3）下的RED第3.1(b)條電磁相容符合性，是進入匈牙利的無線設備的強制要求。中國CCC EMC證書（GB/T 9254 / YD/T）不滿足該路徑。須在CE標誌和合格聲明發布前，提供歐盟認可或ILAC MRA實驗室出具的EN 301 489檢測報告。

requirement_topic.en: RoHS 2 & REACH — Hazardous Substance Restrictions (Hungary / EU)
requirement_topic.zh: RoHS 2 及 REACH — 有害物质限制（匈牙利 / 欧盟）
requirement_topic.zht: RoHS 2 及 REACH — 有害物質限制（匈牙利 / 歐盟）

summary.en: Hungary applies EU RoHS 2 (Directive 2011/65/EU as amended by Directive 2015/863/EU) and EU REACH Regulation (EC 1907/2006) without national derogation. RoHS 2 restricts the use of ten hazardous substances in electrical and electronic equipment (EEE): lead (Pb), mercury (Hg), cadmium (Cd), hexavalent chromium (Cr VI), polybrominated biphenyls (PBB), polybrominated diphenyl ethers (PBDE), bis(2-ethylhexyl) phthalate (DEHP), butyl benzyl phthalate (BBP), dibutyl phthalate (DBP), and diisobutyl phthalate (DIBP) to the maximum concentration values specified in Annex II. Wi-Fi routers, IoT gateways, smart home devices, and Bluetooth accessories in scope of Category 3 (IT and telecommunications equipment) must comply from the applicable date. A CE mark and DoC must reference RoHS 2 where applicable. REACH restricts or bans SVHCs (Substances of Very High Concern) in articles above 0.1% w/w threshold; importers must also notify ECHA for SVHC content above this threshold. NMHH and Hungarian consumer protection authorities may inspect RoHS documentation during market surveillance visits.
summary.zh: 匈牙利适用欧盟RoHS 2（指令2011/65/EU，经指令2015/863/EU修订）和欧盟REACH法规（EC 1907/2006），无国家豁免。RoHS 2限制电气电子设备（EEE）中十种有害物质的使用：铅（Pb）、汞（Hg）、镉（Cd）、六价铬（Cr VI）、多溴联苯（PBB）、多溴二苯醚（PBDE）、邻苯二甲酸二（2-乙基己基）酯（DEHP）、邻苯二甲酸丁苄酯（BBP）、邻苯二甲酸二丁酯（DBP）和邻苯二甲酸二异丁酯（DIBP），最大浓度限值见附件II。Wi-Fi路由器、物联网网关、智能家居设备和蓝牙配件属于第3类（IT和电信设备）范畴，须自适用日期起符合要求。CE标志和合格声明须在适用时引用RoHS 2。REACH限制或禁止物品中超过0.1%（w/w）阈值的SVHC（高度关注物质）；进口商还须就超出该阈值的SVHC含量向ECHA通报。NMHH和匈牙利消费者保护当局可在市场监管检查中查验RoHS文件。
summary.zht: 匈牙利適用歐盟RoHS 2（指令2011/65/EU，經指令2015/863/EU修訂）和歐盟REACH法規（EC 1907/2006），無國家豁免。RoHS 2限制電氣電子設備（EEE）中十種有害物質的使用：鉛（Pb）、汞（Hg）、鎘（Cd）、六價鉻（Cr VI）、多溴聯苯（PBB）、多溴二苯醚（PBDE）、鄰苯二甲酸二（2-乙基己基）酯（DEHP）、鄰苯二甲酸丁苄酯（BBP）、鄰苯二甲酸二丁酯（DBP）和鄰苯二甲酸二異丁酯（DIBP），最大濃度限值見附件II。Wi-Fi路由器、物聯網閘道器、智慧家居設備和藍牙配件屬於第3類（IT和電信設備）範疇，須自適用日期起符合要求。CE標誌和合格聲明須在適用時引用RoHS 2。REACH限制或禁止物品中超過0.1%（w/w）閾值的SVHC（高度關注物質）；進口商還須就超出該閾值的SVHC含量向ECHA通報。NMHH和匈牙利消費者保護當局可在市場監管檢查中查驗RoHS文件。

standards_or_laws: Directive 2011/65/EU (RoHS 2) as amended by Directive 2015/863/EU — restriction of hazardous substances in EEE; Annex II substance limits
Regulation (EC) No 1907/2006 (REACH) — registration, evaluation, authorisation and restriction of chemicals; SVHC above 0.1% w/w in articles requires notification to ECHA and disclosure to recipients
EN IEC 63000:2018 — Technical documentation for the assessment of electrical and electronic products with respect to the restriction of hazardous substances (RoHS conformance documentation standard)

summary.en: China has national hazardous substance restrictions under China RoHS (SJ/T 11363-2006 and SJ/T 11364-2014, now superseded by GB/T 26572-2011 and SJ/T 11364-2014 as the marking standard). China RoHS Phase 1 requires manufacturers to assess and label products with an EFUP (Environmental Friendly Use Period) marking. China RoHS Phase 2 (effective 1 July 2019) introduced mandatory certification for listed product categories. However, China RoHS Phase 2 substance thresholds and restricted substance lists partially diverge from EU RoHS 2 — notably China RoHS does not restrict the four phthalates (DEHP, BBP, DBP, DIBP) added by Directive 2015/863/EU. Chinese hazardous substance documentation does not satisfy EU RoHS 2 requirements for the Hungarian market.
summary.zh: 中国依据中国RoHS（SJ/T 11363-2006及SJ/T 11364-2014，现已由GB/T 26572-2011和SJ/T 11364-2014作为标注标准取代）对有害物质实施国家限制。中国RoHS第一阶段要求制造商评估产品并标注环保使用期（EFUP）标识。中国RoHS第二阶段（2019年7月1日起生效）对列明产品类别引入强制认证。然而，中国RoHS第二阶段的物质限值和限制物质清单与欧盟RoHS 2存在部分偏差——特别是中国RoHS不限制欧盟指令2015/863/EU新增的四种邻苯二甲酸酯（DEHP、BBP、DBP、DIBP）。中国有害物质文件不满足匈牙利市场的欧盟RoHS 2要求。
summary.zht: 中國依據中國RoHS（SJ/T 11363-2006及SJ/T 11364-2014，現已由GB/T 26572-2011和SJ/T 11364-2014作為標注標準取代）對有害物質實施國家限制。中國RoHS第一階段要求製造商評估產品並標注環保使用期（EFUP）標識。中國RoHS第二階段（2019年7月1日起生效）對列明產品類別引入強制認證。然而，中國RoHS第二階段的物質限值和限制物質清單與歐盟RoHS 2存在部分偏差——特別是中國RoHS不限制歐盟指令2015/863/EU新增的四種鄰苯二甲酸酯（DEHP、BBP、DBP、DIBP）。中國有害物質文件不滿足匈牙利市場的歐盟RoHS 2要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 26572-2011 — Requirements of concentration limits for certain restricted substances in electrical and electronic products (China RoHS Phase 2 substance limits)
SJ/T 11364-2014 — Marking for control of pollution caused by electronic information products (China RoHS EFUP marking standard)

gap.en: Two substance-list gaps and one documentation gap exist: (1) Phthalates gap — EU RoHS 2 restricts DEHP, BBP, DBP, and DIBP (added by Directive 2015/863/EU from 22 July 2019); China RoHS does not restrict these four phthalates; Chinese test reports may not cover phthalate content to EU limits; (2) SVHC gap — REACH SVHC list is updated biannually by ECHA and contains ~240 substances as of 2025; Chinese products must be tested or assessed against the current ECHA SVHC candidate list; (3) Documentation gap — EU RoHS 2 requires a DoC referencing EN IEC 63000 technical documentation; Chinese China RoHS Phase 2 documentation does not satisfy this. Manufacturers exporting to Hungary must obtain updated RoHS 2 test reports covering all ten restricted substances and verify REACH SVHC compliance against the current ECHA candidate list.
gap.zh: 存在两项物质清单差距和一项文件差距：（1）邻苯二甲酸酯差距——欧盟RoHS 2限制DEHP、BBP、DBP和DIBP（2019年7月22日起依据指令2015/863/EU新增）；中国RoHS不限制这四种邻苯二甲酸酯；中国检测报告可能未涵盖按欧盟限值的邻苯二甲酸酯含量；（2）SVHC差距——REACH SVHC清单由ECHA每半年更新，截至2025年已包含约240种物质；中国产品须按现行ECHA SVHC候选清单进行检测或评估；（3）文件差距——欧盟RoHS 2要求引用EN IEC 63000技术文件的合格声明；中国RoHS第二阶段文件不满足此要求。出口到匈牙利的制造商须取得涵盖全部十种限制物质的最新RoHS 2检测报告，并按现行ECHA候选清单核验REACH SVHC合规性。
gap.zht: 存在兩項物質清單差距和一項文件差距：（1）鄰苯二甲酸酯差距——歐盟RoHS 2限制DEHP、BBP、DBP和DIBP（2019年7月22日起依據指令2015/863/EU新增）；中國RoHS不限制這四種鄰苯二甲酸酯；中國檢測報告可能未涵蓋按歐盟限值的鄰苯二甲酸酯含量；（2）SVHC差距——REACH SVHC清單由ECHA每半年更新，截至2025年已包含約240種物質；中國產品須按現行ECHA SVHC候選清單進行檢測或評估；（3）文件差距——歐盟RoHS 2要求引用EN IEC 63000技術文件的合格聲明；中國RoHS第二階段文件不滿足此要求。出口到匈牙利的製造商須取得涵蓋全部十種限制物質的最新RoHS 2檢測報告，並按現行ECHA候選清單核驗REACH SVHC合規性。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Directive 2011/65/EU (RoHS 2) as amended; Regulation (EC) 1907/2006 (REACH); applies to all EEE placed on the Hungarian/EU market; CE marking requires RoHS DoC
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 26572-2011 (China RoHS Phase 2) for listed categories; phthalate restrictions absent; does not satisfy EU RoHS 2

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EU RoHS 2 and REACH apply in full in Hungary. China RoHS does not cover the four phthalates added by Directive 2015/863/EU. Exporters must obtain fresh RoHS 2 test reports covering all ten restricted substances and verify REACH SVHC compliance against the current ECHA candidate list (updated biannually). A RoHS 2 Declaration of Conformity referencing EN IEC 63000 technical documentation is required as part of the CE marking package.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 欧盟RoHS 2和REACH在匈牙利全面适用。中国RoHS未涵盖指令2015/863/EU新增的四种邻苯二甲酸酯。出口商须取得涵盖全部十种限制物质的最新RoHS 2检测报告，并按ECHA候选清单（每半年更新）核验REACH SVHC合规性。引用EN IEC 63000技术文件的RoHS 2合格声明是CE标志文件包的必要组成部分。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 歐盟RoHS 2和REACH在匈牙利全面適用。中國RoHS未涵蓋指令2015/863/EU新增的四種鄰苯二甲酸酯。出口商須取得涵蓋全部十種限制物質的最新RoHS 2檢測報告，並按ECHA候選清單（每半年更新）核驗REACH SVHC合規性。引用EN IEC 63000技術文件的RoHS 2合格聲明是CE標誌文件包的必要組成部分。
